headline: Arista’s Gartner Leadership Highlights Push Into Campus And AIOps Software
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN. The company introduced new ruggedized wired platforms and advanced wireless access points aimed at enterprise campus deployments. Arista evolved its AVA autonomous virtual assistant into a multi domain agentic AIOps platform for broader operational analytics and automation. Arista is best known for data center networking, but the latest recognition and product set...
